title: Workflow Schema
description: Schema definition for a Workflow file.

name.description: A short, human-readable name for the workflow.

description.description: A concise description of what the workflow accomplishes.

inputs.description: A list of global inputs that the workflow requires.

name.description: The name of the input variable.

description.description: A description of what this input represents.

steps.description: An ordered list of prompt execution steps that make up the workflow.

step_id.description: A unique identifier for the step within the workflow.

prompt_file.description: The path to the .prompt.yaml file to be executed in this step.

map_inputs.description: An object that maps the variables required by the prompt to their data sources.
